# Psalms 112

## Verses (10)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let the Lord be praised. Happy is the man who gives honour to the Lord, and has great delight in his laws. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | His seed will be strong on the earth; blessings will be on the generation of the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | A store of wealth will be in his house, and his righteousness will be for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For the upright there is a light shining in the dark; he is full of grace and pity. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | All is well for the man who is kind and gives freely to others; he will make good his cause when he is judged. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He will not ever be moved; the memory of the upright will be living for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He will have no fear of evil news; his heart is fixed, for his hope is in the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | His heart is resting safely, he will have no fear, till he sees trouble come on his haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He has given with open hands to the poor; his righteousness is for ever; his horn will be lifted up with honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The sinner will see it with grief; he will be wasted away with envy; the desire of the evil-doers will come to nothing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
